title: IEEE 754 Binary Floating-Point Datum
statement:
An \emph{IEEE 754 binary floating-point datum} is a binary encoding partitioned into
three fields:

- a \emph{sign field} consisting of one bit,
- an \emph{exponent field} consisting of a fixed number of bits,
- a \emph{fraction field} consisting of a fixed number of bits.

Its interpretation depends on the exponent-field pattern and the fraction-field pattern.
